purpose: Teaching-oriented relative emphasis scores for the README radar visualization. Scores are not product rankings.

agents.name: Codex CLI
agents.rationale: Strong engineering workflow, editing constraints, final answer requirements, frontend guidance, and collaboration rules.

agents.name: Claude Code
agents.rationale: Strong harness semantics, permission behavior, file-based memory, task/workflow orchestration, and user-facing conventions.

agents.name: OpenClaw
agents.rationale: Broad personal-agent operating system with tools, long-term memory, sessions, heartbeat, messaging, and explicit safety boundaries.

agents.name: opencode
agents.rationale: Very strong autonomy and workflow enforcement with heavy research and testing emphasis; useful as both pattern and cautionary sample.

agents.name: Kimi CLI
agents.rationale: Clear plan mode, task tooling, project guidance, and tool usage rules.

agents.name: Hermes Agent
agents.rationale: Rich tool catalog, browser controls, delegation, memory, session search, and patch-oriented execution.

agents.name: Pi
agents.rationale: Minimal coding agent harness; useful baseline for teaching prompt evolution.
